series_metadata.series_description: Files contain lists of lower and higher authority decisions mailed to all interested parties. The list certifies that the Unemployment Compensation Review Commission decisions were enclosed in envelopes bearing the interested parties names and addresses and mailed on a specific date and time and processed accordingly by Ohio Department of Job and Family Services mail staff. Includes, but not limited to a daily listing of appeal docket number, clients name, employers, and addresses, total number of cases, and total number of actual mailings, signature of commission representative and mail staff representative.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in office 2, then transfer to records center for 3 years, then destory., Paper: Shred
